subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamored of the Beauty of the All-Glorious! Upon thee be the glory of God, His bounty and His grace in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق جمال ذی الجلال علیک بهاء الله و جوده و فضله فی جمیع الشئون الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
